claim.observation: The safe summary records two parsed Chrome History databases with 19 total URL rows, 11 visits, 5 download rows, and zero rows for selected cloud/service URL needles including Google Drive/Docs/Mail/Accounts, Dropbox, OneDrive, MEGA, WeTransfer, and GitHub.
claim.interpretation: This is a browser-history boundary for the captured Chrome profiles and selected URL needles. It weakens a browser-UI cloud-drive theory in these DBs, but does not rule out DriveFS/sync clients, other browsers, deleted history, other URLs, or server-side activity.
